description_long: This is a compact, wheeled street food cart with a metallic body and a prominent grilling area, topped with a row of fresh tomatoes and a rotisserie spit. The front features a grill with visible food items, a wooden cutting board, utensils, and a blue-and-white beverage dispenser. Overhead, a string of exposed light bulbs is strung between two poles, adding a festive touch. The cart is equipped with two large bicycle wheels for mobility and has storage compartments beneath the main counter. The side and rear views reveal additional prep surfaces, a towel, and more produce, while the overall design is utilitarian and functional. The exterior is mostly dark metal, with accents of wood, plastic, and food items providing visual contrast.
description: A compact, metallic street food cart with a grill, beverage dispenser, and festive string lights, topped with fresh produce and equipped for mobile food service.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grill, rotisserie, cutting board, utensils, beverage dispenser, and a row of tomatoes, with string lights overhead.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the beverage dispenser, cups, and the edge of the grill, with the cart's wheel and storage visible below.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full row of tomatoes on top, the curved metallic cover, and the cart's dual wheels and under-counter storage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a towel, additional prep surfaces, and the back of the grill area, with some produce and utensils visible.
